name: Koopa Compiler Dev
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; if ! command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y curl; fi; unset HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY ALL_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy all_proxy; if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash || true; fi'
postStartCommand:
bash -lc 'set -e; mkdir -p /root/.claude; persistent_cfg=/root/.claude/config.json; if [ -f /root/.claude.json ] && [ ! -L /root/.claude.json ] && [ ! -e "$persistent_cfg" ]; then cp /root/.claude.json "$persistent_cfg"; fi; if [ -e "$persistent_cfg" ]; then rm -f /root/.claude.json; ln -s "$persistent_cfg" /root/.claude.json; fi; if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; vsix=$(find /vscode/vscode-server/extensionsCache -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "anthropic.claude-code-*-linux-x64" | sort | tail -n 1); if [ -n "$vsix" ]; then mkdir -p /root/.local/bin; VSIX_PATH="$vsix" python3 - <<"PY"
import os
import stat
import zipfile
vsix = os.environ["VSIX_PATH"]
out = "/root/.local/bin/claude"
with zipfile.ZipFile(vsix) as zf, open(out, "wb") as f:
    f.write(zf.read("extension/resources/native-binary/claude"))
os.chmod(out, os.stat(out).st_mode | stat.S_IXUSR | stat.S_IXGRP | stat.S_IXOTH)
PY
fi'
